EventDescriptions.EventDescription: GitLab Runner failed to publish the state "{object.state}" for job #{object.id} on host {event_src.host}
GitLab Runner from host {src.host} published the state "{object.state}" for job #{object.id} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
GitLab Runner failed to request a new job list on host {event_src.host}
GitLab Runner from host {src.host} requested a new job list on host {event_src.host}
